archetype_description: Wants maximum return with minimum effort. Impatient with process, energised by net figures.
data_note: Only 1 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

what_they_focus_on.point: Two simultaneous changeovers would require paid cleaners — risk of becoming manual cleaners instead of entrepreneurs
Booking.com guest quality: drug preparation incidents, difficulty claiming compensation
£200 dining table destroyed — compensation still pending
£100k renovation investment exposed to guest damage
STL worst month projection (£952) vs monthly costs (£1,100) = potential small monthly loss
Considering long-let first as lower-risk option

objections_they_raise.objection: Two simultaneous changeovers would require paid cleaners — risk of becoming manual cleaners instead of entrepreneurs
Booking.com guest quality: drug preparation incidents, difficulty claiming compensation
£200 dining table destroyed — compensation still pending

what_moves_them.point: Guest screening with deposits and ID checks — directly addresses Booking.com pain
Freeing you up to be entrepreneurs, not manual cleaners — scalability pitch
Slack channel + monthly reporting as professional management layer

language_to_mirror.phrase: risk of becoming manual cleaners instead of entrepreneurs
test the long-term rental market first

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Lead with the net number immediately. Don't make them wait for the punchline.
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: 'Your property could earn £X per year net — here's how that compares to what you're doing now.'
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Long explanations of process and operations. They want outcomes, not methodology.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Make signing feel frictionless. 'This is a 10-minute process — I'll walk you through it now if you want.'
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Present the offer as unlocking the fast path: 'Sign by [date] and we can get you live within 3 weeks.'

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
